title: Author a live_component with preload/1 stub
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/components/user_row_component.ex (module MyAppWeb.UserRowComponent) as a Phoenix.LiveComponent. Implement preload/1 that receives list_of_assigns and returns the same list (this is a stub — preload is where batching logic would go). Implement update/2 that assigns the data. The key point: preload/1 must be defined, even if trivially. render/1 shows the user row.
tier_rationale: Preload/1 is a lesser-used callback; declaring it correctly is the key test.
